name: Fremont Petroleum Corporation Ltd
summary: Fremont Petroleum Corporation Ltd engages in the exploration and development of oil and gas assets in the United States. It holds 100% interest in the Pathfinder project covering an area of 15,282 acres in DJ Basin in Colorado. The company was formerly known as Austin Exploration Limited and changed its name to Fremont Petroleum Corporation Ltd in June 2017. Fremont Petroleum Corporation Ltd was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Florence, Colorado.
